Implements a 2.x status bar for backward compatibility with older firmware apps.

# Purpose
This header file, `status_bar_legacy2.h`, provides definitions for implementing a status bar compatible with older firmware versions. It includes a macro `STATUS_BAR_HEIGHT` that defines the height of the status bar as 16 units. Additionally, it defines `STATUS_BAR_FRAME` using the `GRect` macro, which specifies the position and dimensions of the status bar, starting at the top-left corner of the display and extending across the full width (`DISP_COLS`) with the defined height. The file ensures backward compatibility for applications that require the legacy status bar layout.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `applib/graphics/gtypes.h`
